overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt exploring a sunny medieval harbor town. The character walks along wooden docks, ascends a coastal boardwalk, and explores a sandy beach with a large castle city visible on the cliffs.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval harbor dock with wooden piers

events.description: Geralt passes by guards standing near the water's edge

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the harbor front, passing dock workers and wooden crates

notable_agents.action: two guards in striped uniforms standing and conversing near the dock

entered.detail: tall stone tower with red conical roof across the harbor
weathered wooden piers and platforms along the water
low stone wall running parallel to the water
scattered cargo containers and barrels on the dock
wooden boat moored at the dock

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a medieval harbor dock, passing wooden crates and villagers. The red-roofed stone tower stands prominently across the water while guards in striped uniforms converse near the pier.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden coastal boardwalk along the cliffside

events.description: Geralt begins ascending wooden stairs to the elevated walkway
reaches the top of the stairs and proceeds along the coastal boardwalk

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbs wooden stairs and walks along an elevated boardwalk overlooking the sea

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase leading up the cliffside
elevated wooden walkway with railings overlooking the water
green leafy trees overhanging the boardwalk
medieval city with red roofs built on the distant cliff face

segments.scene_description: Ascending wooden stairs to an elevated boardwalk, Geralt moves along a narrow cliffside path with trees overhead. The castle city becomes visible in the distance across the bay.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach transition area below the boardwalk

events.description: Geralt descends wooden stairs from the boardwalk to the beach level
moves from wooden structures onto open sandy beach

agents.ego_description: Geralt descends to the beach and walks along the shoreline with the castle in view

entered.detail: sandy shore with patches of grass
wooden posts supporting the overhead boardwalk structure
calm clear water lapping at the shore
vertical wooden stakes marking the water line

segments.scene_description: Geralt descends from the boardwalk to a sandy beach, transitioning from wooden structures to open shoreline. The castle on the cliff dominates the right side of the view while shallow water laps at the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal beach with panoramic sea and mountain views

events.description: Geralt turns slightly to survey the castle city on the cliff before continuing
approaching a distant figure standing on the beach near the water

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the open beach, occasionally looking toward the castle and approaching a distant NPC

notable_agents.action: distant villager standing near the water's edge facing the sea

entered.detail: hazy mountains visible across the bay

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open beach, Geralt approaches a distant NPC while enjoying panoramic views of the sea and distant mountains. The castle remains visible on the cliffs to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling medieval harbor dock toward an expansive, open shoreline beneath a towering castle city. It begins with Geralt walking past wooden crates and villagers on the pier, with a red-roofed stone tower and guards in striped uniforms visible across the water. As he ascends wooden stairs, the scene shifts to an elevated boardwalk and a narrow cliffside path shaded by trees, gradually revealing the distant castle city across the bay. The camera then follows his descent from the wooden structures onto a sandy beach, where the view opens up to shallow water lapping at the shore and the castle dominating the cliffs to the right. Finally, the movement continues along the open beach toward a distant NPC, expanding the perspective to include panoramic views of the sea and far-off mountains.
